name: Calculating Items
pages: When an item is added to the crafting queue, Craft Tracker examines the ingredients required to make the item.$(br2)If an ingredient is also crafted, Craft Tracker also look at what is required to make that item, ultimately compiling a list of "intermediate" crafted items and raw materials.$(br2)If there are multiple ways to make an item, Craft Tracker calculates the "cost" of that method using a variety of factors, and chooses the "cheapest" one.

Some of the things that factor into the "cost" of a recipe and its constituent items are:$(br2)$(li)The tags associated with the item$(li)A specific overridden cost value for the item$(li)Multipliers for the namespace of the recipe or ingredient$(li)Multipliers for the type of recipe
Most of the factors affecting cost can be $(l:config)configured$(/l).
